memberdef.name: DelayCf64_getset
DelayCf64ObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "delay.DelayCf64", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(DelayCf64Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)DelayCf64Obj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "DelayCf64 type.", .tp_methods = DelayCf64Obj_methods, .tp_getset = DelayCf64_getset, .tp_new = DelayCf64Obj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)DelayCf64Obj_init, }
